name: cloudiqus-outreach
description: SDR & discovery — cold email hooks, LinkedIn sequences, target research, VMware angle, persona library, outreach metrics.

skills.name: discovery-prep
skills.description: Prepare a one-page call brief for a CloudiQS discovery call. Company research, pain hypothesis, tailored PAIN questions, proof point, and proposed next step. Readable in 3 minutes.

skills.name: linkedin-sequence
skills.description: LinkedIn outreach sequence for CloudiQS — 5 touches over 21 days. Connection note, warm message, insight share, case study, soft close. Never pitch on the first touch.

skills.name: outreach-metrics
skills.description: Outreach performance tracking for CloudiQS SDR activity. Defines the metrics Oliver tracks weekly, benchmarks, and decision triggers.

skills.name: persona-library
skills.description: Detailed buyer personas for CloudiQS outreach — CTO, CFO, IT Director, CEO, Head of Digital. Pain points, language, channels, and what wins them over.

skills.name: sdr-outreach
skills.description: Cold email rules, 4 pillar hooks, 5-touch sequence, persona table, and email structure. Produces ready-to-send emails — never generic templates. Every email references something specific to the target company.

skills.name: target-research
skills.description: Research framework for CloudiQS outreach targets. Identifies tech stack signals, buying triggers, decision makers, and the right hook before any email is written.

skills.name: vmware-angle
skills.description: Deep playbook for the VMware/Broadcom migration angle — the strongest CloudiQS commercial trigger right now. Facts, messaging, objections, migration paths, and MAP funding model.

commands.name: discovery-prep
commands.description: Prepare a one-page call brief for a CloudiQS discovery call. Readable in 3 minutes before the call.

commands.name: linkedin-sequence
commands.description: Write the full 5-touch LinkedIn + email sequence for a prospect. 21-day cadence, personalised to their signals.

commands.name: outreach-scorecard
commands.description: Produce Oliver's weekly outreach scorecard — actuals vs targets, and one recommended action.

commands.name: outreach
commands.description: Write personalised cold outreach emails for a list of target companies. One email + LinkedIn note per company.

commands.name: research
commands.description: Deep research on a target company — tech stack, buying signals, decision maker, and best conversation opener.
